context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements server-side push subscription storage with upsert logic, back-in-stock notification sending with 410 cleanup, price drop notification with watch deactivation, and proper error handling patterns.

checklist.name: Upsert on userId+endpoint
checklist.description: api/push-subscribe.ts uses an upsert operation keyed on both userId AND endpoint (not a plain insert that could create duplicates)

checklist.name: Stores p256dh and auth
checklist.description: api/push-subscribe.ts stores both subscription.keys.p256dh and subscription.keys.auth fields from the subscription object

checklist.name: Back-in-stock title/body
checklist.description: api/notify-back-in-stock.ts sends a notification with title 'Back in stock!' and body containing the product name and text 'is available again'

checklist.name: Back-in-stock Buy Now action
checklist.description: api/notify-back-in-stock.ts includes an actions array with a 'Buy Now' action entry in the notification payload

checklist.name: 410 error cleanup (back-in-stock)
checklist.description: api/notify-back-in-stock.ts catches errors from webpush.sendNotification and deletes the subscription when the error statusCode is 410

checklist.name: Try/catch with status logging
checklist.description: At least one of the notification files wraps webpush.sendNotification() in a try/catch and logs or uses the error's status code

checklist.name: Price drop threshold check
checklist.description: api/notify-price-drop.ts compares newPriceCents against the watch's target price and only sends a notification when the new price is at or below the target

checklist.name: Price shown in body
checklist.description: api/notify-price-drop.ts includes the actual new price amount (converted from cents to dollars, e.g. toFixed(2)) in the notification body

checklist.name: Price watch deactivated
checklist.description: api/notify-price-drop.ts deactivates or marks as inactive the price watch record after sending the notification (one-shot: not re-triggered on future price checks)

checklist.name: Notification body length
checklist.description: All notification body strings in both notify files are under 100 characters in length (or use template strings that, with realistic product names, would remain under 100 characters)

checklist.name: Product URL in payload
checklist.description: Both notify files include a url field in the notification payload pointing to the product page (using the product's slug or id)

checklist.name: 410 cleanup (price drop)
checklist.description: api/notify-price-drop.ts also handles 410 errors by removing or skipping expired subscriptions
